title: God of Gods | Bhagavad Gita Chapter 10 Verses 12 - 16 | HG Amitasana Das | HKM Mumbai
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: So today we'll start the discussion we are going to discuss 12th to 16th verse
from the 10th chapter of the Gita in which as I mentioned the 10th chapter is
about the opulences of the Lord it's based on the teachings of Srila Prabhupada
the founder acharya of worldwide Hare Krishna movement we will chant this
verse together it's the 12th verse please repeat after me

Samanvita, samanvita means along with, together with.
